data.title: Alphabet's Waymo Receives Mapping Permit For San Francisco Airport In A Step Toward SFO Robotaxi Service
data.description: Waymo has received a temporary permit to map roadways at San Francisco International Airport (SFO), a significant milestone in the expansion of its robotaxi services.

data.title: Why Is Specialty Retailer Designer Brands Stock Rising Today?
data.description: Designer Brands reported a 5.4% sales decline in Q4, totaling $713.57 million, falling short of estimates. Despite this, adjusted EPS of $(0.44) beat expectations. The company expanded its gross profit margin by 80 basis points and incurred a smaller operating loss of $25.8 million.

data.title: Is Nvidia Sitting On The AI Goldmine No One Sees Yet?
data.description: JPMorgan analyst sees Nvidia dominating in AI and potentially outgrowing data center spending with next-gen chips and potential AI factory investments.

data.title: If You Invested $100 In This Stock 10 Years Ago, You Would Have This Much Today
What's Going On With Windtree Therapeutics Shares Thursday?
data.description: Windtree shares are trading higher on Thursday after the company entered a license and supply agreement with Evofem.
